notes: The venture book grows up. What these models actually represent — for the class of company priced on its programs rather than its statements — is major capital investments and strategic initiatives: AI/datacenter buildouts, autonomy programs, launch systems. The strawman's single discounted payoff flattened everything that matters about them. Wave 1 of STRATEGIC-INITIATIVES-SPEC replaces it: - A dated cash-flow lattice per initiative. Explicit start date, horizon, and life treatment (finite, Gordon fade-to-perpetuity, or exit multiple). Every flow discounts FROM ITS DATE; valuing as of an earl
